description: This file is part of the Bootstrap project, specifically handling DOM data storage by associating elements with instances via a Map. It provides methods to set, get, and remove instances tied to DOM elements, ensuring only one instance per element is maintained.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Associates a DOM element with a key and an instance, ensuring only one instance per element.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the instance associated with a DOM element and key.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the association of an instance from a DOM element based on the key.
